get.description:
Trigger broker price subscription (same as Socket.IO subscribeToPrice).
Use to test Cumberland FIX QuoteRequest → Quote flow.
Example: GET /test/broker-subscribe?currencyFrom=BTC&currencyTo=USD

post.description:
Place an order with a broker using a previous RFQ (Cumberland FIX: sends 35=D on OE, waits for 35=8).
Body: rfqId, clientId, brokerId, currencyFrom, currencyTo, brokerQuantity, target, brokerInstrument, brokerSide, brokerRatio, brokerPrice (from broker-rfq response).

get.description:
RFQ then order in one call (use fresh QuoteEntryID so order doesn't get "Quote not found").
Example: GET /test/broker-rfq-order?currencyFrom=BTC&currencyTo=USD&quantity=0.001&target=from&broker=Cumberland

Request a quote from a broker (Cumberland FIX: RFQ via MD snapshot).
Example: GET /test/broker-rfq?currencyFrom=BTC&currencyTo=USD&quantity=0.001&target=from&broker=Cumberland

post.description:
Test endpoint: deposit crypto to a user's vault using global Fireblocks API key.
Source vault from env FIREBLOCKS_DEPOSIT_SOURCE_VAULT_ID (default "0").
Destination vault is resolved from the user's subscription (query param userId).

Integration test: check all trade combinations for all brokers (employee context).
Requires ?currencies=ETH&currencies=BTC (at least 2). Body: optional quantity, target.

Integration test: check all trade combinations for all brokers (client context).
Requires ?currencies=ETH&currencies=BTC (at least 2). Body: optional quantity, target.

get.summary: Get deposit addresses for client owned by the user

currentPage.description: The zero-based index of the current page

clientType.description: This field will be set when registering an user, then it will be read only. Nobody will be transferred to another organization

organization.description: Organization Id if kind is RoleOrganization or RoleMultidesk

desk.description: Desk Id if kind is RoleDesk

vaultType.description: vault or organization if kind is RoleClearer

clientType.description: Only present when userType is CLIENT. Possible values: individual | corporate.

hasFireblocksApiKey.description: Indicates whether the user has a Fireblocks API key configured

hasFireblocksApiSecretKey.description: Indicates whether the user has a Fireblocks API secret key configured

coWorker.description: Co-worker (manager) ID - filters investors by manager

exist.description: Number of existing transactions that were already present

target.description: Whether quantity is FROM (sell) or TO (buy)
Whether quantity is FROM (sell) or TO (buy)

vaultActionId.description: Action Id of initiated associated transaction if any
Action Id of initiated associated transaction if any

accountFrom.description: Trading account Id (organization account to debit)

accountTo.description: Current account Id (investor account to credit)

accountFrom.description: Current account Id (investor account to debit)

accountTo.description: Trading account Id (organization account to credit)

vaultActionId.description: Action Id of initiated associated transaction if any

target.description: Whether quantity is FROM (sell) or TO (buy)

broker.description: Broker name (e.g. Cumberland, B2C2). Omit to use best quote across all brokers.

quantityNoFees.description: Quantity minus fees, that investor expected to receive

target.description: Whether FROM (sell) or TO (buy) Quantity is the expected Target

price.description: Expected price at which you want the order to be executed

feeClearer.description: Clearer Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

feeOrganization.description: Organization Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

feeVAT.description: VAT Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

brokerInstrument.description: Broker trade Instrument (specific to a Broker)

brokerSide.description: BUY or SELL Side of the Broker quote (specific to a Broker)

brokerRatio.description: Ratio specified by the Broker (price for 1 unit)

brokerPrice.description: Broker response with the Price (quantity * ratio)

sell.description: Final Quantity the investor going to Sell FROM account

buy.description: Final Quantity the investor going to Buy TO account

symbol.description: Predefined instrument used on frontend for tradingview graph

target.description: Whether FROM (sell) or TO (buy) Quantity should be the exact Target

symbol.description: Predefined instrument used on frontend for tradingview graph

target.description: Whether FROM (sell) or TO (buy) Quantity should be the exact Target

vaultActionId.description: Action Id of initiated associated transaction if any

rfqId.description: RFQ Id to make an order by

target.description: Whether FROM (sell) or TO (buy) Quantity is the expected Target

feeClearer.description: Clearer Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

feeOrganization.description: Organization Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

feeVAT.description: VAT Fee taken in TO (buy) currency

brokerQuantity.description: Quantity requested from a Broker (if Target is TO then RfqQuantity equals Quantity + Fees, if Target is FROM then RfqQuantity equals Quantity)

brokerInstrument.description: Broker trade Instrument (specific to a Broker)

brokerSide.description: BUY or SELL Side of the Broker quote (specific to a Broker)

brokerRatio.description: Ratio specified by the Broker (price for 1 unit)

brokerPrice.description: Broker response with the Price (quantity * ratio)

sell.description: Final Quantity the investor going to Sell FROM account

buy.description: Final Quantity the investor going to Buy TO account

vaultActionId.description: Action Id of initiated associated transaction if any

servicesPlannedToUse.description: Services the user plans to use
example: Payments / transfers in fiat or crypto

note.description: Optional free-text note shown in Logs / Comments

reviewAnswer.description: Overall AML review answer (e.g. RED, YELLOW, GREEN)

verificationSteps.description: Per-step verification status: IDENTITY (ID doc + imageIds + status), SELFIE (selfie/liveness + status), PROOF_OF_RESIDENCE (proof of address + status). Includes imageIds for document images.

name.description: Name of the list or source

birthYears.description: Birth years associated with the match

riskLabels.description: Risk labels (e.g. sanction, pep, adverseMedia, crime)

matchStatus.description: Match status: potential_match, false_positive, true_positive, unknown

modifiedAt.description: When the hit review was last updated (UTC)

applicantName.description: Applicant full name from KYC (screened person/entity)

amlCaseCreatedAt.description: When the AML case was created (UTC)

reviewAnswer.description: Overall screening result: GREEN (clear), YELLOW (review), RED (high risk)

hasSameNameMatches.description: Whether any same-name or similar matches were found on sanctions/watchlists

hits.description: List of matches (people/companies with same or similar name on sanctions, PEP, adverse media, etc.)

ok.description: Whether the AML check was triggered

reviewStatus.description: KYC review status (e.g. completed, pending, init)

reviewAnswer.description: Review result answer (e.g. GREEN, RED, YELLOW)

externalUserId.description: User ID (external user ID in Sumsub)

kyc.description: KYC data from Sumsub; null if applicant not found

aml.description: AML case data from Sumsub; null if no AML case or applicant not found

ok.description: Whether the AML check was triggered

status.description: started = basic not done yet. Individuals: started, basicDone, enhancedDone, accepted, accountOpened. Corporates: started, basicDone, accepted, accountOpened.

levelName.description: Sumsub verification level name (e.g. basic-kyc-level). If omitted, backend uses SUMSUB_DEFAULT_LEVEL.

applicantIdentifiers.description: Applicant email and/or phone; when set, added to applicant profile

ttlInSecs.description: Token lifespan in seconds. If omitted, backend uses SUMSUB_DEFAULT_TTL_SECS or 600.

token.description: Sumsub SDK access token for the client

userId.description: Applicant identifier (userId) bound to the token

fireblocksApiKey.description: Fireblocks API Key (will be encrypted before storage)

fireblocksApiSecretKey.description: Fireblocks API Secret Key (will be encrypted before storage)
